analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with incomplete black hole-themed UI implementations. The current state shows unfinished CSS animations, broken JavaScript functionality, and incomplete HTML content. The theme should focus on cosmic visuals with black hole animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with full dark cosmic theme including black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and animated slide transitions.
Complete HTML content with all sections properly included: main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, navigation menu with hamburger icon for mobile.

Fix syntax errors in showSlide function, complete JavaScript content with all functions properly implemented, add event listeners for new buttons, and ensure mobile menu toggle functionality works correctly.
